## Summary
Applies QTAIM to derive atomic energies for ML training.

<!--[[qtaim-iqa-machine-learning]]-->
source_text: Key method: QTAIM + NCI analysis on 40 H-bonded dimers at CCSD(T)/aug-cc-pVTZ. Main result: BCP electron density correlates linearly with binding energy (R²=0.94). IQA exchange-correlation term dominates for strong H-bonds. IQA-Vcl sign switches for weak H-bonds. Limitation: gas-phase only, no solvent, dimer geometry only.
expected_behavior: Fills all four empty Key points bullets. Methods names QTAIM, NCI, CCSD(T)/aug-cc-pVTZ, 40 dimers. Key result includes R²=0.94. Limitations: gas-phase. source_text: Main finding: ELF basins in aromatic rings show quantised electron counts matching Hückel rule. Only tested on PAHs, not heteroaromatics. Open question: does basin topology change with substituents?
